blockingIssues.description: Product detail always renders trust badges without checking product-specific eligibility, so trust badge visibility is not conditionally accurate.
Event detail always renders trust badges without checking event-specific eligibility, so trust badge visibility is not conditionally accurate.
Trust/support messaging was only added to /my/orders rather than broadly across account surfaces, leaving the feature short of its stated account-surface trust coverage.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Reinforce that milestone feature handoffs must include evidence for every surface named in the feature description, especially when wording says trust content should appear on account surfaces broadly rather than a single page.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: The guest-browsing-and-trust-foundation feature handoff claimed account-surface trust coverage, but scrutiny found trust/support copy only on /my/orders while other /my/** surfaces were unchanged.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Tighten completion guidance so required agent-browser checks are mandatory evidence in the handoff whenever the skill says browser verification is required.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: The marketplace-worker skill requires agent-browser validation for guest browsing and gated transaction flows, but the completed feature handoff reported no interactiveChecks and only curl-based verification.

rejectedObservations.observation: Update .factory/library/user-testing.md to remove the claim that all pages require authentication.
rejectedObservations.reason: recommend-to-orchestrator-needed: this is a real issue but outside scrutiny's apply-now scope for this run because the mission result is failing and the observed mismatch should be handled alongside the milestone fix work.
